name: Robot Head

name: Person Icon

props_interface: cx, cy, scale, startFrame, drawDuration, shirtColor, hairColor

name: Brain Icon
description: Brain blob shape with wrinkles. Conveys thinking, intelligence, cognition, knowledge, mind, neural.

name: Gear Icon
description: 8-tooth mechanical gear with center hole. Conveys settings, engineering, mechanism, process, system, configuration.
props_interface: cx, cy, scale, startFrame, drawDuration, color

name: Lightbulb
description: Light bulb with base and radiating rays. Conveys idea, innovation, insight, creativity, solution, inspiration.

name: Tool Icon
description: Wrench illustration. Conveys tools, repair, maintenance, building, construction, fixing.

name: Target Icon
description: Concentric circles with arrow hitting bullseye. Conveys goal, aim, objective, focus, precision, achievement.

name: Database Icon
description: Cylinder shape with horizontal shelves. Conveys database, storage, data, records, persistence, SQL.

name: Code Icon
description: Code bracket symbols. Conveys programming, code, development, software, engineering, terminal.

name: Cloud Icon
description: Cloud shape. Conveys cloud computing, hosting, internet, SaaS, deployment, infrastructure.

name: Book Icon
description: Book with spine, cover, and text lines. Conveys education, learning, documentation, knowledge, reading, reference.

name: Monitor Icon
description: Computer screen with stand, play button, and progress bar. Conveys video, screen, display, presentation, demo, streaming.

name: Bar Chart
description: 4-bar chart with trend line and arrow. Conveys data, analytics, metrics, growth, statistics, performance.

name: Clock Icon
description: Clock face with hour and minute hands. Conveys time, schedule, deadline, timing, speed, latency.

name: Document Stack
description: 3-layer document stack illustration. Conveys documents, files, paperwork, reports, content, pages.

name: Speech Bubble
description: Rounded box with pointer tail. Conveys dialogue, conversation, communication, message, chat, feedback.
